key_themes: AI算力需求长期增长，市场对Meta过度反应为错误认知
光子学供应链瓶颈（CW激光器、CPO）是核心投资主题
人形机器人商用化加速，美国本土供应链企业受益
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期因市场大幅回调，更强调光子学股票短期波动不改长期基本面，并认为当前是加仓机会。
representative_quotes: In fact things are likely to accelerate from Meta catching up to GPT5.5. I'm personally expecting a sharp V recovery, especially with the names that crashed 50%+ from this narrative.
Feels like all the industry leaders from $TSM Chairman, $TSLA Elon Musk, to $MU CEO see humanoids as the next major trend so physical AI is probably next.

The entire optical components industry today is facing a severe shortage of critical components... GS Research's ~9-10x $154B optical TAM in 2028 and near $0 -> $91B CPO TAM in just 2 1/2 years don't magically disappear from a month of trading volatility.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期更关注AI行业成本下降和泡沫担忧，从之前对AI的乐观转向谨慎。
representative_quotes: The reason is straightforward: certain Chinese AI models cost as little as $2 to $3 per million output tokens, compared to around $15 for comparable US models.
The AI boom in global stock markets has become an unsustainable bubble

On July 23, 2025, Trump purchased up to $5 million of Broadcom, $AVGO, Meta, $META, Amazon, $AMZN, Apple, $AAPL, Microsoft, $MSFT, & Nvidia, $NVDA. Later that day, the Trump admin unveiled its AI Action Plan, a policy that benefited those companies.

key_themes: 存储芯片的长期垄断与暴利周期
玻璃基板与光纤作为下一代AI算力底座
仓位管理与避免杠杆的重要性
AI基建的早期阶段与巨大鸿沟
大市值股票的结构性优势与指数资金推动
xiaomustock.recent_shift: 从早期集中看好海力士和存储芯片，近期转向强调康宁在玻璃基板和光纤的垄断地位，并将其视为英伟达下一代芯片的关键瓶颈。
representative_quotes: 康宁 $GLW 简直是无敌寂寞！262刀了. 5000亿市值也就600刀左右，对英伟达写明面上合作扩产10倍的康宁来说业绩翻10倍远远不止600刀这个价。
存储是AI革命的终极正解。其他股票对比起来，真是一坨垃圾。天壤之别。大仓位一定要拿着存储，捏住🤏AI的俩个蛋蛋。
能健康的管理自己仓位已经赢过绝大多数人。即使买对215刀的康宁，如果上杠杆在2x康宁或者正股也上杠杆，昨天一来一回可能人没了。
